title: The Classes Mod: Reborn
description: The Classes Mod: Reborn(TCM: Reborn) is a reimagined version of my mod TCM. It adds custom abilities that are geared toward PVP and survival PVP using a system called classes which you pick at the start of the game.
body:
The Classes Mod: Reborn is a revamp of my old mod called just "The Classes Mod". 

The Classes Mod: Reborn adds different classes to the game that are intended to change the game massively and add interesting new features. 
Use the command '/Setclasstype <Class> <Target>' to set your class, there will be another way in the future

The current classes are:

Cybernetics: All abilities added, in testing, progression system not yet added, use cybernetic upgrades to decimate your enemies

Human Soul: All abilities added, use human souls to unleash powerful attacks 
(Class name for the command is 'Soul')

Electricity: All abilities added(no cooldowns or energy cost yet), use electricity shock your enemies, damage changing based on the conductivity of your armor

Gravity: All abillities added, manipulate gravity to stack debuffs on your opponents

Toon Force: Incomplete, use the power of cartoons to confuse your opponents by defying the laws of phyisics (Class name for the command is 'ToonForce')

Celestial will no longer be updated or used as part of the mod

This mod intends to appeal to people who like awesome attacks and abilities that are made to look and feel powerful. TCM: Reborn is intended mainly for PvP and multiplayer application.
Some things may not work properly or have bugs, this mod is still in early development and some textures are not final. 
There are no dependencies except neoforge 1.21.4

Please share this mod if you like it

Permissions:
If you use this in a modpack, video, or any other project, even though I can't make you, I would apprieciate credit for my work.
